'''dhopachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:euchred|euchred]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-p-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:euchred|euchred]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhopachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhopachithi|dhopachithi]] || [[word:dhopachiji|dhopachiji]] || [[word:dhopachishi|dhopachishi]] || [[word:dhopachiki|dhopachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhopachuthuthu|dhopachuthuthu]] || [[word:dhopachujuju|dhopachujuju]] || [[word:dhopachushushu|dhopachushushu]] || [[word:dhopachukuku|dhopachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhopachuthu|dhopachuthu]] || [[word:dhopachuju|dhopachuju]] || [[word:dhopachushu|dhopachushu]] || [[word:dhopachuku|dhopachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhopachufthuf|dhopachufthuf]] || [[word:dhopachufjuf|dhopachufjuf]] || [[word:dhopachufshuf|dhopachufshuf]] || [[word:dhopachufkuf|dhopachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhopachethe|dhopachethe]] || [[word:dhopacheje|dhopacheje]] || [[word:dhopacheshe|dhopacheshe]] || [[word:dhopacheke|dhopacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhopachothotho|dhopachothotho]] || [[word:dhopachojojo|dhopachojojo]] || [[word:dhopachoshosho|dhopachoshosho]] || [[word:dhopachokoko|dhopachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhopachotho|dhopachotho]] || [[word:dhopachojo|dhopachojo]] || [[word:dhopachosho|dhopachosho]] || [[word:dhopachoko|dhopachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhopachofthof|dhopachofthof]] || [[word:dhopachofjof|dhopachofjof]] || [[word:dhopachofshof|dhopachofshof]] || [[word:dhopachofkof|dhopachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhopachĂŻfthĂŻf|dhopachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopachĂŻfjĂŻf|dhopachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopachĂŻfshĂŻf|dhopachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopachĂŻfkĂŻf|dhopachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhopachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhopachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhopachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhopachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhopachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhopachĂŻfthĂŻf|dhopachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopachĂŻfjĂŻf|dhopachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopachĂŻfshĂŻf|dhopachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopachĂŻfkĂŻf|dhopachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhopachĂŻfthĂŻf|dhopachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopachĂŻfjĂŻf|dhopachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopachĂŻfshĂŻf|dhopachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopachĂŻfkĂŻf|dhopachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhopachĂŠthĂŠ|dhopachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhopachĂŠjĂŠ|dhopachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhopachĂŠshĂŠ|dhopachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhopachĂŠkĂŠ|dhopachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhopachathatha|dhopachathatha]] || [[word:dhopachajaja|dhopachajaja]] || [[word:dhopachashasha|dhopachashasha]] || [[word:dhopachakaka|dhopachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhopachatha|dhopachatha]] || [[word:dhopachaja|dhopachaja]] || [[word:dhopachasha|dhopachasha]] || [[word:dhopachaka|dhopachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhopachafthaf|dhopachafthaf]] || [[word:dhopachafjaf|dhopachafjaf]] || [[word:dhopachafshaf|dhopachafshaf]] || [[word:dhopachafkaf|dhopachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhopachasha|dhopachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhopachshĂ«sha|dhopachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhopachrosha|dhopachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhopachmusha|dhopachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhopachyasha|dhopachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhopachnkshĂ«sha|godhopachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhopachnkrosha|godhopachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhopachnkmusha|godhopachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhopachnkyasha|godhopachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhopapachasha|dhopapachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhopapachshĂ«sha|dhopapachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhopapachrosha|dhopapachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhopapachmusha|dhopapachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhopapachyasha|dhopapachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhopapachnkshĂ«sha|godhopapachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhopapachnkrosha|godhopapachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhopapachnkmusha|godhopapachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhopapachnkyasha|godhopapachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhepĂŠchasha|dhepĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhepĂŠchshĂ«sha|dhepĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhepĂŠchrosha|dhepĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhepĂŠchmusha|dhepĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhepĂŠchyasha|dhepĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhepĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|godhepĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhepĂŠchnkrosha|godhepĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhepĂŠchnkmusha|godhepĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhepĂŠchnkyasha|godhepĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhopfachasha|dhopfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhopfachshĂ«sha|dhopfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhopfachrosha|dhopfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhopfachmusha|dhopfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhopfachyasha|dhopfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhopfachnkshĂ«sha|godhopfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhopfachnkrosha|godhopfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhopfachnkmusha|godhopfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhopfachnkyasha|godhopfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
